summary: Nvidia approves Samsung's HBM3 chips for AI processors in Chinese market, aiming to comply with US export controls and diversify supplier base.

headline: Tesla, AT&T And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
New Tesla Roadster Will Be 'Something Special,' Says CEO Elon Musk: Production To Commence In 2025
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk says most engineering for upcoming Roadster is done, production to start in 2025. Vehicle will be special, with SpaceX tech for speed boost.

headline: Elon Musk Thinks Cathie Wood-Led Ark Is 'Probably Not Wrong' With Its $5 Trillion Valuation For Tesla, Cites Potential Of Optimus Humanoid Robot
summary: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk has endorsed Cathie Wood-led ARK Invest's $5 trillion valuation forecast for the electric vehicle manufacturer, suggesting it may be conservative. Musk made these remarks during Tesla's second-quarter earnings call on Tuesday.

headline: Tesla Reiterates New Electric Vehicles On Track For 2025, But CEO Elon Musk Refuses To Divulge Details: 'We're Going To Make Great Products'
summary: Tesla plans to produce new electric vehicles in first half of 2022, including more affordable models. CEO Elon Musk teases upcoming vehicles.

headline: As Google Search's Growth Outpaces That Of YouTube, Alphabet CFO Says 'Really Pleased' With Platform: Here's Why
summary: Alphabet Inc. met analyst expectations for its second-quarter earnings but saw a deceleration in YouTube advertising revenue growth compared to the first quarter.

headline: Elon Musk's X, Mark Zuckerberg-Owned Facebook, And TikTok Face Stricter Regulations As Malaysia And Singapore Tighten Oversight On Social Media To Combat Online Scams
summary: Malaysia and Singapore are intensifying their regulation of social media and online marketplaces to tackle the rise in online scams and protect minors.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Family Office-Backed Google Translate Rival DeepL Expands Language Offerings With Traditional Chinese Targeting Baidu, Tencent
summary: DeepL, a prominent artificial intelligence translation startup from Germany, introduced traditional Chinese as a new language option. This move aims to enhance its footprint in Asia.

headline: Sundar Pichai Opens Up On Why Google Is Holding On To Cookies: 'We Now Believe User Choice Is The Best Path Forward'
summary: Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai explained that Google's decision to retain cookies in Chrome is driven by the need to balance user privacy with industry feedback, emphasizing user choice and continued investment in privacy-enhancing technologies.

headline: Elon Musk Agrees with DogeDesigner: Funding For Trump-Supporting Super PAC Is 'Far Below' $45M A Month So Far
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk admitted that funding for his new political action committee called "The America PAC" has been much lower than what recent reports suggested.

headline: Tesla, Google Parent Alphabet, Lockheed Martin, Visa, UPS: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
summary: Major U.S. indices closed lower, influenced by earnings reports from Tesla, Alphabet, and other companies. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.1% to 40,358.09.

headline: Elon Musk's Strong Conviction Highlighted By Gene Munster: 'Anyone Who Doesn't Believe That Tesla Will Solve Vehicle Autonomy Should Not Hold Tesla Stock'
summary: The stock of Tesla Inc. experienced a significant drop in after-hours trading following a bold statement by CEO Elon Musk regarding vehicle autonomy. The stock's plunge came despite the company's second-quarter financial results, which were described as "impressive" by Jim Cramer.

headline: Tesla Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call (CORRECTED)
Bitcoin, Dogecoin Pull Back, Ethereum Holds Steady Amid Mt.Gox Payouts: Analyst Highlights Importance of This Level During Any Unexpected Pullback By King Crypto
summary: Bitcoin, Dogecoin dipped, Ethereum traded flat Tuesday as defunct cryptocurrency exchange Mt. Gox continued to transfer funds meant to pay out its creditors.

headline: Elon Musk Is Polling X And Asking If Tesla Should Invest $5B In Grok Parent xAI: 'This Is Just To Test The Waters'
summary: Elon Musk has launched a poll on X, formerly Twitter, asking if Tesla should invest $5 billion in his AI company xAI, with over 70% of voters currently in favor.

headline: Elon Musk Talks Robotaxi Delay, Nvidia Clusters, And Mexican Gigafactory Postponement Amid Tariff Worries If Trump Wins — Tesla Falls Almost 8% After-Hours
summary: Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla Inc., discussed various aspects of the company's operations during the second-quarter earnings call, including a robotaxi delay and the company's energy business.
